data.name: HeroIntro
data.value: UncannyPrompt is a structured home for reusable AI prompts. It keeps prompts, variables, versions, sharing rules, and audit history together, so useful prompt knowledge does not disappear into chat threads or private notes.

data.name: HeroWorkflow
data.value: The application is organized around Tenants, Workspaces, Projects, folders, and prompts. That hierarchy gives personal users and teams a clear place to create, review, reuse, and publish prompt assets.

data.name: HeroUseCases
data.value: Use it for support playbooks, product research, engineering workflows, content templates, customer communication, and any recurring AI task that benefits from ownership, versioning, and repeatable inputs.

data.name: OverviewDescription
data.value: Learn the building blocks and the normal flow from Tenant to Workspace, Project, folder, prompt, version, and share.

data.name: AccessDescription
data.value: See how sign-in, the Personal Tenant, platform admins, Tenant roles, scope, and public links fit together.

data.name: ApiDescription
data.value: Understand how authenticated API calls can automate prompt catalog, sharing, variables, audit, and Project workflows.
